description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Emscripten that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: build-win10, build-linux, and build-macos, each running on a different OS (Windows 10, Linux, and macOS) with a matrix strategy for Debug and Release configurations. For each job, clone the repository with submodules, validate code format, set up Ninja and Emscripten SDK, configure CMake, and build the project.
